evidences.title: Monad Launches Public Sale on Coinbase's New Token Sale Platform
evidences.content: This week, the Monad public token sale on Coinbase has become one of the tests so far of whether large, high fully diluted valuation (FDV) L1/L2 launches still command investor interest in a more regulated and more skeptical market. As of writing, the sale has raised a little almost $150 million, roughly 80% of its $187.5 million target at $0.025 per MON, with about two and a half days still to run and 7.5% of the 100 billion token supply on offer. We expect the sale to end up oversubscribed, but the order of magnitude is noticeably different from the recent L2 MegaETH public sale that targeted $50 million and drew around $1.4 billion of bids, roughly 28 times the goal. Token launches are clearly back in 2025, yet we see shifting investor behavior. The market is still willing to fund [...] We view the demand profile for Monad fitting into this assertion. In absolute terms, raising around $140 million from a retail-facing public sale before mainnet launch is a strong result, especially for a first offering on a new token launch platform. The initial sale started fast, with roughly half the MON public allocation subscribed within hours, then slowed as more price-sensitive and more...

evidences.title: [PDF] monad / mon token – coinbase token sales disclosure1
evidences.content: Sale: up to 7.5B MON (7.5% of initial total supply). Sale Price: $0.025 per MON. Implied Fully Diluted Value (FDV) of the Monad Network: $2.5 billion. 2 Determination of the Sale Price: Prior to the public sale on Coinbase token sales, there has been no public market for MON tokens. The price of $0.025 per MON token in the public sale is a fixed price based on a $2.5 billion fully diluted network valuation and an initial total supply of 100 billion MON tokens. The sale price was determined through a structured approach that considers several key factors, including market conditions, competitive positioning, and strategic objectives. This methodology ensures that the sale price reflects both the intrinsic value of the Monad network and broader market dynamics. The pricing strategy aims to [...] herein. At the start of Monad Public Mainnet, 50.6B tokens (50.6%) will be locked. Locked tokens cannot be staked. The intent of this is twofold: to ensure that staking rewards initially contribute to the public circulation of MON and to avoid an initial concentration of rewards among those individuals (team members and investors) involved directly with the project. evidences.title: Sonic Labs nears $1B with $800M TVL; 200M S tokens in airdrop ...
evidences.content: Monad is launching airdrop claims page today, taking it one step closer to mainnet and the industry is watching really closely. Founded in 2022, Monad Foundation raised $255m with backing from Paradigm, Electric Capital, Coinbase Ventures, Animoca Ventures, and GSR. So they’re serious. But sentiment has changed a lot since 2022. With an abundance of block space and chains more performant than ever, people are starting to wonder: is there space for anymore general-purpose L1s? Monad’s pitch is clean and simple: EVM, but faster. If it delivers, it’ll handle 10k transactions per second with sub-second finality meaning any Ethereum protocol could migrate without changing a line of code and just… work faster. Pretty cool. Trouble is, better tech doesn’t win by default. Ethereum and Solana [...] is, better tech doesn’t win by default. Ethereum and Solana have deeply entrenched communities of builders, culture and most importantly liquidity. New chains often see a burst of TVL as users farm incentives, but they’re quick to exit as the rewards dry up. Still, Monad looks more prepared than most. It’s quietly built out an ecosystem, sharpened its marketing, and built real community lore a...

evidences.title: Monad ICO on Coinbase Fizzles 12 Hours After Launch - Unchained
evidences.content: Subscribe here to get these updates in your email for free Monad’s token sale was widely anticipated as it marked the first major U.S.-regulated public token sale since 2018. It offered 7.5 billion MON tokens at $0.025 each, representing 7.5% of the total supply, with team and investor allocations locked for at least a year to limit early sell-offs. Coinbase, however, excluded several jurisdictions from participating in the sale for regulatory and compliance reasons. Some market participants attributed the lacklustre performance to Monad’s decision to list on Coinbase, sizing up the token sale against the massively oversubscribed MegaETH token sale late last month. [...] Unchained Beehiiv Beehiiv # Monad ICO on Coinbase Fizzles 12 Hours After Launch Monad’s widely anticipated token sale stalled halfway to its goal, as buyers balked at Coinbase’s gated process and compared the offering unfavorably to last month’s blockbuster MegaETH raise. (AI-generated: ChatGPT) Tikta Tikta Tikta Tikta Coinbase’s public token sale for Monad’s native token MON started strong, raising around $50 million just 45 minutes after launching on Monday. [...] For our institutional customers, our staking process varies by customer. In addition to operating our own validator nodes to provide staking services, we also provide institutional customers access to validator nodes operated by third-party service providers. Institutional customers receive rewards directly from the protocol. The fees we charge to institutional customers depend on the customer agreement and the selected service. As of December 31, 2025, over $15.2 billion worth of assets were staked by institutional customers through Coinbase Prime, as adjusted to USD. evidences.title: Monad token climbs 46% after early dip as Coinbase-sale buyers ...
evidences.content: Advertisement Monad’s MON token traded around $0.0365 by mid-afternoon Monday, up roughly 46% from its $0.025 sale price after recovering from an early slide to about $0.02 shortly after tokens were distributed. It follows the close of Monad's week-long public token sale on Coinbase, the first conducted through the exchange’s new token-launch platform. The offering attracted $269 million in commitments from nearly 86,000 participants, a 1.43× oversubscription of the $187.5 million allocated amount. Monad Token (MON) Price Chart. Source: Coinbase Participants came from more than 70 countries, and Coinbase said internal polling showed most joined for long-term exposure rather than short-term speculation. evidences.title: Monad's First Coinbase Token Sale Oversubscribed 143%, Raising ...
evidences.content: Nov 24, 2025 01:00 (D+122) Nov 23, 2025 Announcement Monad's MON token successfully concluded its first token sale on the Coinbase public sale platform, demonstrating strong early market demand. According to Coinbase, the sale saw 85,800 participants from over 70 countries, with a total of $269 million (USDC) committed, exceeding the target by 1.43 times. This result reverses initial concerns about undersubscription and demonstrates the effectiveness of the MON token's global expansion strategy. Coinbase stated that "99% of all participants will receive nearly their full allocation," and the official distribution results will be announced soon. [...] Monad Co-Founder Keone Hon stated, "Our goal was to achieve the broadest global distribution possible, and Coinbase's structure made this possible." He emphasized that the design of the sale accurately predicted a surge in demand at the end of the sale. The MON token is expected to enter a full-fledged network bootstrap phase with the successful public sale, along with plans for an official listing and ecosystem expansion. Written by: Xangle _info_ Links Related Crypto Assets Image 4: coin Monad $0.0 24H +5.82% Volume(24H) 105.02M M...

evidences.content: 38.5B MON tokens (38.5%) are expected to be allocated to Ecosystem Development; these tokens are unlocked and stewarded by the Monad Foundation. In total, approximately 49.4B MON tokens (49.4%) are unlocked on Day 1 of Monad Public Mainnet. Locked Tokens Tokens for all investors and team members, along with the Category Labs Treasury, are locked on Day 1 of Monad Public Mainnet and are subject to defined unlock and vesting schedules to ensure long-term alignment with the success of the project. All tokens in these categories are locked for a minimum of one year following initial token distribution as part of the launch of Monad Public Mainnet in November 2025, with further unlock schedules varying among group 6 members, as described herein.
